case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS TUREK, ROBERT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $725.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT TUREK, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TUREK, ROBERT
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING RETURNED TO COURT: UNKNOWN AT ADDRESS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TUREK, ROBERT $725.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $750.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING TO DEFT. RETURNED: UNKNOWN AT ADDRESS.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-15-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-05-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED TO COURT: NOVED, UNKNOWN AT ADDRESS.
